title: TGBWDriver: A Cancer Driver Gene Identification Method Based on GraphSAGE and Bidirectional Weighted Feature Aggregation.
snippet: Identifying cancer driver genes is fundamental for understanding tumor initiation and guiding therapeutic strategies. However, most existing methods assess gene importance from a global or static perspective, overlooking sample-specific functional differences in the same gene. To address this, we propose TGBWDriver, which integrates a two-layer GraphSAGE wi...
